description: Golden tracker issue inputs for validating in-repo WORKFLOW.md prompt rendering across active Symphony states.

cases.purpose: Fresh queued work should render the issue identity, Todo state, and description without retry guidance.

issue.title: Create baseline dashboard snapshots
issue.description: Add fixtures that make dashboard rendering regressions easy to spot.

expect_prompt_contains: You are working on a Linear ticket `MT-101`
Add fixtures that make dashboard rendering regressions easy to spot.

cases.purpose: Continuation runs should render follow-up guidance and the empty-description fallback.
expect_prompt_contains: Title: Continue orchestration after transient failure

cases.purpose: Reviewer-requested rework should preserve the Rework state and task-specific feedback context.

issue.title: Address reviewer feedback on workpad handling
issue.description: Re-read the issue and replace the previous approach with a cleaner workpad update path.

expect_prompt_contains: Title: Address reviewer feedback on workpad handling
Re-read the issue and replace the previous approach with a cleaner workpad update path.
Treat `Rework` as a full approach reset

cases.purpose: Approved work entering merge should render the Merging state and land-skill guardrails.

issue.title: Land approved dashboard fixture PR
issue.description: Approval is complete; follow the repository landing loop until the PR is merged.

expect_prompt_contains: Title: Land approved dashboard fixture PR
Do not call `gh pr merge` directly
